selected.description: Whether the primary action represents the selected or current row.

href.description: Destination that renders the primary action as a native anchor.

currentValue.description: `aria-current` value emitted when a linked row is selected.

style.description: Inline style string applied to the `.cinder-selectable-row` root.

unsupportedProps.name: leading
unsupportedProps.description: Leading visual such as an icon, avatar, marker, or status dot.

unsupportedProps.name: meta
unsupportedProps.description: Tertiary metadata such as a timestamp, status, or compact badge.

unsupportedProps.name: onclick
unsupportedProps.description: Called when the native primary button activates.

unsupportedProps.name: trailingActions
unsupportedProps.description: Independent controls rendered as siblings after the primary action.
